text:
Oh dear!

Once upon a time in a sleepy town lived an owl named Oliver.

One autumn night Oliver was sitting quietly on his favorite branch when something shiny appeared near his eye. He blinked.

A new book!

It was about owls. Every page had pictures.

As days turned into weeks he read more. He learned that just one owl can keep mice from their nests.

One evening while reading he heard a crunch.

An owl owl owl!

It was the barn owl.

Just because it couldn weren clocks likes that!

That night Oliver slept well.

Next day he flew down to swap books.

Just tell me which one YOU think!

Oh.

It was hers.

She read every night. She loved books.

An owl?

What do you think?

Which ones do YOU think?

That one.

She gave him hers.

They fell quite lovesakes.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
